description:
Per docs/SPEC-tracker-state.md (bl-40e9). Best done after the config split lands (sibling under bl-e118).

- Rename master / hub / federated-mode in code, CLI help text, and docs to tracker / workspace. Reserve 'external tracker' for Jira / Linear / GitHub Issues so the word is unambiguous.
- Rewrite the README multi-repo section and SKILL.md to the unified model: one tracker address, no mode, the config-ownership split. Supersedes bl-7cea (document master_url) -- master_url is being retired, so that ball's premise is obsolete.
- Final check: every SPEC SS16 conformance test passes once bl-8a9a + the config-split ball + this have landed.
title: Terminology + docs sweep: tracker / workspace
